description: "Repository-specific workflow reminders and verification habits"
applyTo: "**"

# Repository Workflow Memory

Keep repository-specific completion steps consistent.

## Run prek after edits

After finishing changes to files in this repository, run `prek run` from the repository root before considering the task complete. Treat it as the standard final verification step; if it reports problems, address them or clearly report the blocker.
